old_oak_tree.name: Old Oak Tree
old_oak_tree.description: An ancient oak tree with gnarled branches, standing sentinel over the forest path.

mushroom_ring.name: Fairy Ring
mushroom_ring.description: A mysterious circle of glowing mushrooms, said to be a fairy ring.

ancient_tree.name: Ancient Tree
ancient_tree.description: A towering, ancient tree with a hollow in its trunk.

ancient_marker.name: Ancient Stone Marker
ancient_marker.description: A weathered stone marker, covered in unreadable runes.

wild_berry_bush.description: A thorny bush laden with ripe red berries.

mossy_log.description: A fallen log covered in a thick layer of soft green moss.

fern_patch.description: A cluster of vibrant green ferns unfurling in the dim light.

mushroom_cluster.description: A circle of glowing mushrooms sprouting from decaying wood.

ancient_oak.description: A towering ancient oak, its bark thick with age and moss.

mossy_rock.description: A large rock covered in patches of emerald moss.

fallen_log.description: A fallen tree trunk slowly returning to the earth.

fern_grove.description: A dense grove of ferns reaching waist height.

wild_flower_patch.description: A patch of wildflowers in bloom—purple, yellow, and white.

small_stream.description: A small stream trickles over smooth pebbles.

standing_stone.description: A weathered standing stone covered in ancient moss.

wildflower_meadow.description: A stretch of hillside carpeted in blooming wildflowers.

wind_swept_bush.description: A hardy shrub shaped by the constant wind into an interesting form.

rabbit_burrow.description: A small burrow in the hillside—rabbit tracks lead inside.

weeping_willow.description: A graceful weeping willow dipping its branches into the water.

smooth_stones.description: Flat smooth stones perfect for crossing the river.

frog_pond.description: A small pond teeming with frogs and dragonflies.
